programme.title: Forrest Gump
programme.desc: Slow-witted Forrest Gump (Tom Hanks) has never thought of himself as disadvantaged, and thanks to his supportive mother (Sally Field), he leads anything but a restricted life. Whether dominating on the gridiron as a college football star, fighting in Vietnam or captaining a shrimp boat, Forrest inspires people with his childlike optimism. But one person Forrest cares about most may be the most difficult to save -- his childhood love, the sweet but troubled Jenny (Robin Wright).

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Cast Away
programme.desc: Obsessively punctual FedEx executive Chuck Noland (Tom Hanks) is en route to an assignment in Malaysia when his plane crashes over the Pacific Ocean during a storm. The sole survivor of the flight, Chuck washes ashore on a deserted island. When his efforts to sail away and contact help fail, Chuck learns how to survive on the island, where he remains for years, accompanied by only his handmade volleyball friend, Wilson. Will Chuck ever return to civilization and reunite with his loved ones?

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: The Sixth Sense
programme.desc: Young Cole Sear (Haley Joel Osment) is haunted by a dark secret: he is visited by ghosts. Cole is frightened by visitations from those with unresolved problems who appear from the shadows. He is too afraid to tell anyone about his anguish, except child psychologist Dr. Malcolm Crowe (Bruce Willis). As Dr. Crowe tries to uncover the truth about Cole's supernatural abilities, the consequences for client and therapist are a jolt that awakens them both to something unexplainable.

rating.system: Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: June and Dorie's routine in Teddy's fallout shelter is disrupted when they discover the origins of their home and its sinister connections to Teddy's past.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Against the advice of the group, Sarah searches for Wendell, and in the process encounters a dangerous survivor who forces her to take part in a search of his own.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Three Stooges
programme.desc: Crooks steal a prize pup from the Stooges' animal hospital.

programme.title: Interested in Gold? Learn More!
programme.desc: Gold has been the best long-term asset class for thousands of years; find out how you can protect your financial future by diversifying your nest-egg with physical gold today.

programme.title: Joint Relief Revolution
programme.desc: Join Connie Craig-Carroll and health visionary Ken Meares as they uncover OmegaXL, the groundbreaking natural supplement transforming lives by tackling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: 1776 Gold Rare Coin
programme.desc: Celebrate the 250th Anniversary of American Freedom with this Gold 1776-2026 American Gold Eagle graded PF70UCAM. Encapsulated in a 1 of 2500 40th Anniversary holder with the First Day of Issue designation, this is a once in a lifetime American coin!

programme.title: Authors' Book Club: Meet the Authors!
programme.desc: Meet the authors who wrote the book on publishing; learn what it takes to write, distribute, publish, and promote a book; these author interviews offer tips, tricks, and insights from publishing experts.

programme.title: An Aetna Medicare Advantage plan might be right for you
programme.desc: When it comes to Medicare coverage, there are a lot of options. Learn about your choices so that you can select the coverage that's right for you. Call to speak with a licensed Aetna agent today.

programme.title: Freedom to Leave the House! Inogen Portable Oxygen
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: The Three Stooges
programme.desc: Shemp's dad falls for a gun moll.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Three Stooges
programme.desc: Lawbreakers in England, the Stooges are sent by the government to the new colonies to help fight the "red man savage.".

programme.title: The Goonies
programme.desc: When two brothers find out they might lose their house they are desperate to find a way to keep their home. They find a treasure map and bring some friends along to find it. They are all out looking for the "X" and trying to get away from a group of bad guys who also want the treasure.

programme.title: Forrest Gump
programme.desc: Slow-witted Forrest Gump (Tom Hanks) has never thought of himself as disadvantaged, and thanks to his supportive mother (Sally Field), he leads anything but a restricted life. Whether dominating on the gridiron as a college football star, fighting in Vietnam or captaining a shrimp boat, Forrest inspires people with his childlike optimism. But one person Forrest cares about most may be the most difficult to save -- his childhood love, the sweet but troubled Jenny (Robin Wright).

programme.title: Cast Away
programme.desc: Obsessively punctual FedEx executive Chuck Noland (Tom Hanks) is en route to an assignment in Malaysia when his plane crashes over the Pacific Ocean during a storm. The sole survivor of the flight, Chuck washes ashore on a deserted island. When his efforts to sail away and contact help fail, Chuck learns how to survive on the island, where he remains for years, accompanied by only his handmade volleyball friend, Wilson. Will Chuck ever return to civilization and reunite with his loved ones?

Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: The Martian
programme.desc: When astronauts blast off from the planet Mars, they leave behind Mark Watney, presumed dead after a fierce storm. With only a meager amount of supplies, the stranded visitor must utilize his wits and spirit to find a way to survive on the hostile planet. Meanwhile, back on Earth, members of NASA and a team of international scientists work tirelessly to bring him home, while his crew mates hatch their own plan for a daring rescue mission.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Live: TNA iMPACT!
programme.desc: Matches and storylines feature superstars battling for supremacy and championship gold within the ring.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Beetlejuice
programme.desc: After Barbara and Adam Maitland die in a car accident, they find themselves stuck haunting their country residence, unable to leave the house. When the unbearable Deetzes and teen daughter Lydia buy the home, the Maitlands attempt to scare them away without success. Their efforts attract Beetlejuice, a rambunctious spirit whose help quickly becomes dangerous for the Maitlands and innocent Lydia.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: WarGames
programme.desc: High school student David Lightman unwittingly hacks into a military supercomputer while searching for new video games. After starting a game of Global Thermonuclear War, Lightman leads the supercomputer to activate the nation's nuclear arsenal in response to his simulated threat as the Soviet Union. Once the clueless hacker comes to his senses, Lightman, with help from his girlfriend, must find a way to alert the authorities to stop the onset of World War III.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: With a code to guide them, Dwight and Sherry become ethical outlaws known as the Dark Horses; when Strand recruits them for a search and rescue mission, it forces them to question their code and their future.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Morgan searches for Al, only to discover that he's not the only one looking for her, and that his search may have put a target on his own back.

programme.desc: Curly becomes enraged whenever he hears the tune "Pop Goes the Weasel"; fight manager Moe plans to take full advantage.

programme.desc: In this compelling investigation, John Walsh delves into OmegaXL and its natural origins; discover how this innovative supplement can provide relief from joint pain and improve your quality of life, all grounded in extensive research.

programme.desc: See how one company is changing people's lives by helping them put their tax problems to rest.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: After the members of a team of scientists (Harold Ramis, Dan Aykroyd, Bill Murray) lose their cushy positions at a university in New York City, they decide to become "ghostbusters" to wage a high-tech battle with the supernatural for money. They stumble upon a gateway to another dimension, a doorway that will release evil upon the city. The Ghostbusters must now save New York from complete destruction.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Lost Boys
programme.desc: Teenage brothers Michael (Jason Patric) and Sam (Corey Haim) move with their mother (Dianne Wiest) to a small town in northern California. While the younger Sam meets a pair of kindred spirits in geeky comic-book nerds Edward (Corey Feldman) and Alan (Jamison Newlander), the angst-ridden Michael soon falls for Star (Jami Gertz) -- who turns out to be in thrall to David (Kiefer Sutherland), leader of a local gang of vampires. Sam and his new friends must save Michael and Star from the undead.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Beetlejuice
programme.desc: After Barbara and Adam Maitland die in a car accident, they find themselves stuck haunting their country residence, unable to leave the house. When the unbearable Deetzes and teen daughter Lydia buy the home, the Maitlands attempt to scare them away without success. Their efforts attract Beetlejuice, a rambunctious spirit whose help quickly becomes dangerous for the Maitlands and innocent Lydia.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: In what was once North America, the Capitol of Panem maintains its hold on its 12 districts by forcing them each to select a boy and a girl, called Tributes, to compete in a nationally televised event called the Hunger Games. Every citizen must watch as the youths fight to the death until only one remains. District 12 Tribute Katniss Everdeen (Jennifer Lawrence) has little to rely on, other than her hunting skills and sharp instincts, in an arena where she must weigh survival against love.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Catching Fire
programme.desc: After arriving safely home from their unprecedented victory in the 74th Annual Hunger Games, Katniss Everdeen (Jennifer Lawrence) and Peeta Mellark (Josh Hutcherson) discover that they must do a quick turnaround and begin a Victors Tour. As she and Peeta travel throughout the districts, Katniss senses a rebellion is stirring. However, President Snow (Donald Sutherland) proves that he is still very much in control when word comes of a cruel change in the rules for the upcoming 75th Hunger Games.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Sixteen Candles
programme.desc: With the occasion all but overshadowed by her sister's upcoming wedding, angst-ridden Samantha (Molly Ringwald) faces her 16th birthday with typical adolescent dread. Samantha pines for studly older boy Jake (Michael Schoeffling), but worries that her chastity will be a turnoff for the popular senior. Meanwhile, Samantha must constantly rebuff the affections of nerdy Ted (Anthony Michael Hall), the only boy in the school, unfortunately, who seems to take an interest in her.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
